name: Doubled Image
flavor: Which one of you is real? Wrong question - ask which one of you the crowd is watching.
description: Illusory afterimages of yourself flicker into being every time you move, blurring exactly where your real body is. Attack rolls against you have disadvantage for the duration, unless the attacker doesn't rely on sight to locate you (a blind attacker, or one with truesight or another sense that sees through the illusion) or can otherwise track you by a non-visual sense.
sheetSummary: Bonus action, self, cooldown 3, concentration up to 1 min. Attack rolls against you have disadvantage (no effect on attackers who don't rely on sight, e.g. truesight or blind).
